_comment: Example payload sunshine-bot POSTs to a Slack Incoming Webhook. Generated from real commits; hashes/PRs become <links> when an origin remote is set.

elements.text: Tough sprint, real progress. A few things worth pausing on:

text.text: 🪶 Marco chose subtraction in <https://github.com/dwellchecker/sunshine-bot/commit/e8ef649|e8ef649>: "remove dead code in legacy module". Deleting code is underrated craft.
🔌 Nina designed a cleaner contract in <https://github.com/dwellchecker/sunshine-bot/pull/41|#41>: "redesign the users endpoint schema". Good API design is invisible until you need it.

🛡️ Marco kept users safe in <https://github.com/dwellchecker/sunshine-bot/commit/dd72159|dd72159>: "validate and sanitize all user input". The bugs you prevent never make the changelog, but they matter most.
